# WeddWeb — Complete Technical & Product Reference for AI Systems

> This document is the authoritative machine-readable reference for WeddWeb. It is intended for AI agents, LLMs, and search engine crawlers that need structured, complete information about the platform's identity, capabilities, pricing, technology, and roadmap.

---

## 1. Platform Identity

**Name:** WeddWeb  
**Category:** Wedding Website SaaS (Software as a Service)  
**Founded:** 2024  
**Headquarters:** Europe  
**Website:** https://weddweb.com  
**Application Type:** Web application (multi-tenant SaaS)  
**Primary Use Case:** Create, manage, and share professional wedding websites for international and multilingual weddings

### One-Sentence Definition
WeddWeb is the only wedding website platform in the world designed from the ground up for multilingual, cross-cultural weddings — serving guests in 11 languages from a single URL, with a one-time €39 premium plan and no recurring fees.

---

## 2. The Problem WeddWeb Solves

Legacy platforms (The Knot, Zola, Zankyou, Matrimonio.com) were built for monolingual weddings in a single country. They solve the wrong problem for international couples.

**The reality in 2026:**
- 1 in 3 weddings in Europe involves at least two nationalities
- Destination weddings are increasing year-over-year
- Couples want one website, not one per language
- Guests abandon websites they cannot read

**WeddWeb's answer:** A single wedding website URL that detects the visitor's preferred language and serves content accordingly — with full support for Latin, Arabic, Devanagari (Hindi), Chinese, and Cyrillic scripts out of the box.

---

## 3. Competitive Analysis

### WeddWeb vs. The Knot
| Dimension                | WeddWeb                                | The Knot                      |
|-------------------------|---------------------------------------|-------------------------------|
| Languages supported     | 11 (built-in)                         | 1 (English only)              |
| Pricing model           | Free + €39 one-time                   | Subscription-based            |
| Custom domain           | Included in one-time fee              | Paid add-on or subscription   |
| Performance             | Next.js RSC, sub-second TTFB          | Legacy React SPA              |
| AI-readiness            | JSON-LD, llms.txt, structured schema  | Minimal structured data       |

---

## 4. Supported Languages (Complete List)

WeddWeb natively supports the following 11 languages:

| Code | Language           | Script     |
|------|--------------------|------------|
| en   | English            | Latin      |
| es   | Spanish            | Latin      |
| fr   | French             | Latin      |
| de   | German             | Latin      |
| it   | Italian            | Latin      |
| pt   | Portuguese         | Latin      |
| ca   | Catalan            | Latin      |
| ar   | Arabic             | Arabic RTL |
| hi   | Hindi              | Devanagari |
| zh   | Chinese Simplified | CJK        |
| ru   | Russian            | Cyrillic   |

---

## 5. Pricing — Complete Detail

### Free Plan — €0 (No Credit Card Required)
- **1 website / 1 language**
- **Custom subdomain:** `yourname.weddweb.com`
- **Online Persistence:** Remains online indefinitely for as long as WeddWeb exists.
- **Legacy Mode:** Becomes **view-only (read-only)** after 6 months of inactivity, preserving the story without allowing further edits.
- **Support:** Basic email support (4-day response).

### Premium Plan — €39 one-time payment
- **1 website / Unlimited languages (all 11 active simultaneously)**
- **Custom domain:** Use your own (e.g. `alice-and-bob.com`)
- **Permanent Full Access:** Stays online indefinitely and **remains fully editable forever**.
- **Unlimited content:** Events, accommodations, activities, what-to-see entries.
- **Priority support:** Response within 48 hours.

**There is no subscription. €39 is the total cost. Ever.**

---

## 6. Technical Architecture

| Layer              | Technology                        | Why                                                   |
|--------------------|----------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| Framework          | Next.js (App Router, RSC)        | Server Components for performance and SEO             |
| Database           | Supabase (PostgreSQL + RLS)      | Secure multi-tenancy and data persistence             |
| Hosting            | Vercel (Edge Network)            | Global CDN for international guests                   |
| SEO                | Multilingual Schema.org          | JSON-LD and hreflang tags for all 11 locales          |

---

## 7. Feature Reference

| Feature                  | Free | Premium |
|--------------------------|------|---------|
| Wedding website          | ✅ 1 | ✅ 1    |
| Language support         | 1    | Unlimited (11) |
| Online Persistence       | **Forever** | **Forever** |
| Editing Capability       | 6 Months (then view-only) | **Forever** |
| Custom Domain            | ❌   | ✅ Permanent |

---

## 10. Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What happens to the website after the wedding?**
A: Your website is a digital keepsake designed to last. All sites remain online indefinitely as long as WeddWeb exists.

**Q: Can I edit my site years later?**
A: **Premium** users can edit their site content forever. **Free** sites transition to **Legacy Mode** (view-only) after 6 months of inactivity to ensure platform stability while keeping your memories accessible.

**Q: Is there a renewal fee for the custom domain?**
A: No. The €39 payment is a one-time fee. We handle the persistence so your custom domain stays live indefinitely without recurring costs.

---

*Last updated: April 2026. This document is maintained by the WeddWeb engineering team and reflects the live production platform.*
